text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, there's going to be a massive game of
"Umamusume tag" using the entire training track.
Or at least, that was the plan...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The rain finally stopped, but I guess it was a mistake to come today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... The course is a total mess. We can't play
tag like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, due to the rain, spirits are low for
both spectators and participants. There are
rumors going around that it might be canceled.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why?! I've been looking forward to this for
forever!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna show everyone how good I am at
getting away... and now I can't!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hold on there, partner! Don't say that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... But there's no way the audience can get
pumped up in these conditions...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No, no, you've got it all wrong. You have to
remember, El.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We still race even on rainy days, right? The
audience gets excited then too, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Then it should be the same for tag, right? It's way
too early to give up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right! It's not like me to ignore
a challenge!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A true wrestler is one who fires up the audience
no matter what!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's go, Taiki! Time to step into the
ring!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm talkin' about. ♪ Leeet's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: El and Taiki
text_block_list.text: Yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! The track's a mess, but look at them!
They're so fast!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Phew! If I keep running like this, I'm gonna get
mud inside my shoes too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
But look at those two go! I'm getting pumped up
just watching them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of El Condor Pasa and Taiki Shuttle
running pulls everyone out of the dumps, and the
game of tag ends amidst a storm of hype!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! What's this?! Even the sun came out to see
me run!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You were unbelievable, El! I couldn't keep up with
ya!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Like a condor soaring through a storm!
I've mastered runnin' in the rain!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, get tagged and you're on the chase, tag
someone and you're on the run! That was one
heated duel after another!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The audience was really into it too! That's what I
call top-notch entertainment!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But the best part was playing with you, Taiki!
